description.zh-Hans: 为上游粒子添加大小脉动、闪烁、曲折运动、环绕、阻力或色相循环。
description.en: Adds pulse, flicker, zigzag, orbit, drag or hue cycling to upstream particles.

triggers.zh-Hans: 粒子闪烁, 粒子脉动, 粒子变色, 粒子曲线运动, 粒子阻力
triggers.en: particle flicker, pulse, color cycle, curved motion, drag

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 连接在发射器或力场之后、粒子渲染之前。
exampleUsage.en: Place it after an emitter or force and before Particle Render.
